parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter mapping enrollment changes to mortality fraction

programs.comments: Uses the accounting identity deltaN = deltaB / c to express beta from deltaB; beta is proportional to the fraction of incremental enrollees in the population scaled by kappa.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter mapping enrollment changes to mortality fraction

programs.comments: Directly maps incremental enrollment to mortality effect; uses c to convert deltaB to deltaN for consistency. Both expressions reflect the dilution effect of incremental enrollment on population mortality.
